candidates.why: Best total top-line revenue row; includes Net Sales plus other operating revenue and is not a balancing item.
Alternative revenue label used in some years; more narrow than Operating revenue but still a valid sales line.
Revenue component, but not the main top-line by itself.
Balancing row, not an actual reported revenue line.
Balancing row, not an actual reported revenue line.
COGS, not revenue.
Operating expense, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for revenue line changes across years; prefer the broader reported top-line.

candidates.why: Explicit COGS label from the candidate list; semantically the correct direct cost line even though preview values are blank.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit COGS label per semantics; preview blanks do not disqualify it.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component.
Explicitly excluded from XSGA per instructions because D&A should not be included.
Likely broad overhead bucket covering selling/admin/marketing and other external operating costs.
Additional overhead bucket; operating expense component, not a total.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Candidate list misses key overhead rows. No explicit populated SG&A total line is present; statement presentation appears to shift between detailed rows (e.g., Sales costs, Administrative costs, Marketing costs) and broader buckets (Other external expenses). Chose the broadest non-total overhead components while excluding D&A and COGS, but manual review is needed to confirm no overlap/double counting. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other external expenses, [Income Statement] Others operating expenses

candidates.why: Explicit R&D/development expense line; best match for XRD.
R&D-related D&A, but XRD should be the main R&D expense line, not D&A.
Balancing row, not an actual reported expense line.

variables.notes: Using the explicit development expense line as the R&D proxy.

candidates.why: Most specific pure interest expense label; preferred over broader finance-cost labels.
Broader financing cost line that may be used in some years if the pure interest line is absent.
Too narrow; lease-interest subcomponent only.
Generic supplemental line; appears blank in preview and less preferable than reported primary lines.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest detail only, not total interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the most specific reported interest-expense row first, then the broader similar-charges row if needed.

candidates.why: Total equity likely includes minority interest, so not preferred when a parent-equity line exists.
Balancing row, not an equity line item.
Balance sheet total, not equity.
Best parent/common equity line because it differs from Total equity by the Minority Interest amount, indicating exclusion of minority interests.

variables.notes: Preferred candidate list does not include the better owner-equity label. Chose 'Equity' from the full preview because it appears to exclude minority interest: in years shown, 'Total equity' differs from 'Equity' by the 'Minority Interest' amount. Manual review is flagged because this required going outside candidates. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity

candidates.why: Explicit balance-sheet minority interest / non-controlling interest line.
Income-statement attribution line, not preferred for balance-sheet MIB.
Income-statement attribution line, not preferred for balance-sheet MIB.

variables.notes: Using the explicit balance-sheet minority interest line to avoid double counting with BE.
